app.title: Show HN: Fast, native Mac file manager (filters, fuzzy find, 9 MB, no Electron)
app.author: whimbyte
proposed_tests: Run a benchmark comparing whimfiles to other file managers.
Test filtering and fuzzy find features.
Verify that the app does not use Electron.
